title: Version 0.11.4
text: Minor fix pkgdown build process Add easy version bumping factory Fix update-module files get stored

title: Version 0.11.1
text: make R-local now produces file e.g. R-4.3.2 doesn’t include additional bindings environment variables within container - people increasingly putting settings HOME area broke containment running interactively. Instead, want include extra access, set variable INTERACTIVE_SINGULARITY ~/.bashrc e.g. export INTERACTIVE_SINGULARITY='--bind $$HOME/.Xauthority,$$HOME/.Xdefaults,$$HOME/.Xresources,$$HOME/.emacs.d,$$HOME/.ssh --env DISPLAY=$$DISPLAY'. double $ means variables get expanded runtime, rather point generate R-4.3.2 (mean DISPLAY date).

title: Version 0.11.0
text: Change way version numbers propagated quarto report - qmd files don’t get tagged now (allow better cacheing - yet implemented), instead figures get git information inserted filenames. Rationalise directory structure - resources now contains auxilliary makefiles renv initialisation files. extra files either modules (spec files configs) get put extdata along things like R.bib
